name: Look Down
short_description: A survival horror game where you've been shrunk down and must climb, use telekinesis, and escape deadly traps while escaping a macabre experiment.
detailed_description:
Look Down is a survival horror game in which you have been kidnapped by a former government scientist and shrunk to serve as a guinea pig in his macabre experiments. Now trapped in a dangerous environment, your only goal is to escape—but it won’t be easy.

Face a hostile world where everyday objects become gigantic obstacles and lethal traps. Use your wits to climb furniture, avoid turrets, and escape a robotic vacuum cleaner programmed to hunt you down without mercy. Using telekinesis mechanics, manipulate objects to open paths and protect yourself, while uncovering the secrets behind the kidnapper and his intentions.

You can run, hide, and fight, but remember: he’s always watching. And if you fail, you’ll be just another lost guinea pig.
